issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Reflective access to sCursorWindowSize, which is not part of the public SDK and therefore likely to change in future Android releases
Field requires API level 33 (current min is 26): `android.Manifest.permission#POST_NOTIFICATIONS`
Reading locale in a non-observable way in a composable function
Reading locale in a non-observable way in a composable function
Reading locale in a non-observable way in a composable function
Reading locale in a non-observable way in a composable function

"Avaliable" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Available"?
Formatting %d followed by words ("tokens"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("more"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("questions"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("results"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("messages"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("Citations"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("entries"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("files"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("models"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("lines"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This initialization lambda (`{ 0 }`) is unnecessary and is less efficient

issue.message: The resource `R.string.reasoning_custom` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.reasoning_heavy_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="reasoning_heavy_desc">The model will use a large amount of reasoning to answer questions.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.reasoning_light_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="reasoning_light_desc">The model will use a small amount of reasoning to answer questions.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.reasoning_medium_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="reasoning_medium_desc">The model will use more reasoning to answer questions.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.reasoning_off_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="reasoning_off_desc">Turn off reasoning functionality, the model will directly answer questions.</string>

State backed values should use the lambda overload of Modifier.offset

issue.errorLine1: <string name="setting_asr_configure_vad_desc">伺服器 VAD 靈敏度，通常為 0.3 - 0.8</string>
<string name="setting_asr_configure_vad_desc">服务器 VAD 灵敏度，通常为 0.3 - 0.8</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_pitch_description">控制語音音調高低 (0.1 - 2.0，1.0為正常音調)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_pitch_description">音声のピッチを制御 (0.1 - 2.0、1.0が標準)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_speech_rate_description">控制語音播放速度 (0.1 - 3.0，1.0為正常速度)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_pitch_description">控制语音音调高低 (0.1 - 2.0，1.0为正常音调)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_speech_rate_description">音声の再生速度を制御 (0.1 - 3.0、1.0が標準)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_speech_rate_description">控制语音播放速度 (0.1 - 3.0，1.0为正常速度)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_pitch_description">Control the pitch of speech (0.1 - 2.0, 1.0 is normal)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_speech_rate_description">Control the speed of speech (0.1 - 3.0, 1.0 is normal)</string>

Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
Custom view ``TerminalView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
Custom view ``TerminalView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
Use "`Gravity.START`" instead of "`Gravity.LEFT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.START`" instead of "`Gravity.LEFT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.END`" instead of "`Gravity.RIGHT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.END`" instead of "`Gravity.RIGHT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
